name: Workday Adaptive Planning API
what_it_does: Workday Adaptive Planning REST API for cloud financial planning and analysis (FP&A). Enables AI agents to read and write budget and forecast data, retrieve actuals and variance reports, manage planning models and versions, automate data imports from ERP systems, and integrate financial planning workflows with Workday HCM and third-party financial systems.
use_cases: Importing actuals from ERP into Adaptive Planning from financial consolidation agents
Retrieving budget vs actuals variance data from FP&A reporting agents
Automating forecast model updates from rolling forecast agents
Integrating headcount and compensation data with workforce planning agents
not_for: Operational accounting and general ledger without planning focus
Tax compliance and statutory reporting without FP&A requirements
Small business without structured budgeting processes
best_when: A finance team using Workday Adaptive Planning wants AI agents to automate data imports, generate variance reports, and maintain rolling forecast models across business units.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Budget and forecast data directly informs executive decisions and resource allocation. Automated updates must be validated against source data before committing to planning models.

auth.notes: Workday Adaptive Planning uses Workday OAuth 2.0 with client credentials. Integration System User (ISU) accounts required for API access. Workday tenant-scoped credentials. Separate from core Workday HCM credentials.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise FP&A SaaS pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise annual contracts based on users and modules; Workday acquisition 2018
pricing.notes: Acquired by Workday in 2018. Mid-market to enterprise FP&A platform. API included with enterprise subscriptions. Strong integration with Workday HCM for workforce planning.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API client; enterprise SLAs available

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Budget and forecast data drives executive decisions — validate all automated updates
No public MCP server — REST API with Workday OAuth2 ISU credentials
Workday ISU setup required — not self-service; needs Workday admin configuration
No webhooks — must poll for updated data or use scheduled imports
Planning model versions are immutable once locked — understand version lifecycle
Workday-acquired product: some APIs use older Adaptive terminology vs Workday patterns
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: Budget and forecast financial data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. Workday OAuth2 with ISU accounts. Enterprise-grade security.

security_score_components.security_notes: Financial planning data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. Workday OAuth2 ISU accounts. Multi-region data residency.
